_comment: Day 70+ — Default ensemble model weights with relaxed thresholds for more trade activity. master_analyst (LLM) added 2026-07-23 as a genuine 5th voter (see ml/ensemble.py) — weights don't need to sum to 1.0, ConfidenceFusion.fuse() renormalizes dynamically.
_agreement_rules_note: Informational only — NOT read by code. Actual position sizing is ratio-based (see ml/voting_engine.py:_agreement_position): >=100% agreement=FULL, >=75%=HALF, >=50%=REDUCED, else NO_TRADE. Works for any voter count, e.g. now 5 with master_analyst included.
